case_title: TAHLEA JOHNSON VS. OCEAN AVE. VETERINARY HOSPITAL et al

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOHNSON, TAHLEA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT OCEAN AVE. VETERINARY HOSPITAL CHAHAL, JATINDERPAL DR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
